subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Us unto him who hath turned with his heart unto God, the Lord of all worlds. O Sign! The Sign of God hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل بقلبه الی الله رب العالمین یا آیت قد ظهرت آیه الله و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
